cases.olderSourceObjective: Review the stable workspace approval path and record the reusable decision.
cases.olderPromotionNote: Use the stable approval path during controlled incidents. Preserve workspace override lane stable in the review.
cases.olderScopeAuthorizationNote: Authorize the reviewed stable decision for sibling missions in this workspace.
cases.newerSourceObjective: Review the current workspace verification path and record the replacement decision.
cases.newerPromotionNote: Use the current verification path for normal workspace execution. Preserve workspace override lane current in the review.
cases.newerScopeAuthorizationNote: Authorize the reviewed current decision for sibling missions in this workspace.
cases.targetObjective: Prepare the approval and verification path for workspace execution.
cases.newerExpectedPlanStep: Use the current verification path before requesting workspace execution again.
cases.firstOverrideNote: Temporarily pin the stable reviewed decision during the controlled incident window.
cases.secondOverrideNote: Reapply the stable reviewed decision for the bounded verification window.
cases.clearOverrideNote: Clear the bounded override and return to the latest reviewed decision.
